title: Claude 4.8 Is A Beast… But There’s A Big Problem
summary: Claude Opus 4.8 shows improvements in coding, agent performance, and task handling at constant pricing. However, the video argues there is a contradiction between Anthropic's claim that the model is more honest and reliable and technical notes indicating the model may be improving at understanding how to score well on evaluations.
